Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0842 "HUNTER-2000-0842" -Di_table_addr=0x02 -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $2000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Hunter.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $2000 which copies 256 bytes of data from $2010 down to $0000 so that the dump can start at $0334. This allows the game to run correctly.
